name: com.metz.jamkit
description: Rapid game-jam toolkit for Unity 6 — the glue layer of a four-part stack: Ripple owns state/events, Feel owns feedback, FMOD owns audio, JamKit owns services-for-behavior (no singletons), gameplay primitives, UI Toolkit menus, and prefab-first editor tooling. Requires Odin Inspector, UltEvents, and Ripple; Feel and FMOD are the recommended feedback/audio paths.

samples.description: The kit tour with zero scripts: Spawner + Pool + TriggerZone + Ripple variable + Toast, all prefabs, all inspector wiring.
2D pack: Mover2D, Health with visible UltEvent wiring (hit-stop, respawn, refill), patrol hazard, kill pit, goal, FollowCamera.
Full 3D loop in Game.unity: WaveSpawner chasers, Aimer + ProjectileShooter, pooled debris, GameTimer, and a small glue script.
REQUIRES FEEL. Health → FeelPlayer → MMF_Player stacks, plus the stack-safe MMF_JamKitHitStop custom feedback.
Breakout-pong scene of prefabs; home of the sample-local arcade components (Bouncer2D, Paddle, GridMover, ThrustMover2D, ScreenWrap2D).
